attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; functions as a high-altitude domestique capable of extended pacing work on climbs before finales rather than launching personal attacks.
team_tactics: Deployed as an expendable climber to control tempo and burn matches early on difficult ascents, allowing protected riders to save energy for decisive moments.
terrain_preference: High-altitude climbs where sustained pacing ability is valued over explosive accelerations; thrives in tempo-setting rather than reactive racing.
vulnerability: Shows selective effort allocation when team tactics don't align with personal interest; reluctant to contribute to chases that don't serve direct team objectives.
key_patterns: Functions primarily as sacrificial domestique on climbs, burning energy before finales (2 observations)
Exhibits selective work refusal when tactical situation doesn't suit team strategy (2 observations)
Valued for extended high-altitude pacing capacity rather than finishing ability (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Limited recent data, but 2022 observation shows continued utility in domestique role without evidence of elevation to protected status
